paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is 6.32, with a change of -3.95% from the prior close and -20.9% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 23, 2026. There have been 3 new news items in the last 24 hours. Recent news headlines include discussions of Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt AI campus in the Texas Panhandle, and Fermi Inc's admission of shares of Common Stock.

The recent news is driven by developments related to Project Matador and the company's operations. News sources such as Environment America and NewsChannel 10 on MSN have reported on the project, with Environment America expressing concerns about the project's water usage. Fermi officials have met with community leaders to discuss the project.

There have been various SEC filings by Fermi Inc, including the appointment of new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of convertible senior notes. There is one Form 4 filing in the feed. The company has also had social media activity, with 3 new posts in the last 24 hours, including a discussion thread on Fermi America and a reference to the latest 8K filing.
